title: Principal Investment Banker at Paytm Money

jsonLd.title: Principal Investment Banker at Paytm Money
jsonLd.description:
We at Paytm Money are looking for an experienced Investment Banker based out of Raipur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Paytm Money:
Paytm Money is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Paytm Money!
